        parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots8 || "0", 10);
      const numSpellSlots9Avail =
        parseInt(record?.data?.numSpellSlots9 || "0", 10) -
        parseInt(record?.data?.spellSlots9 || "0", 10);

      const hasPactAvailable =
        numPactMagicAvail1 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail2 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail3 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail4 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail5 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail6 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail7 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail8 > 0 ||
        numPactMagicAvail9 > 0;

      const hasSpellSlotsAvailable =
        numSpellSlots1Avail > 0 ||
        numSpellSlots2Avail > 0 ||
        numSpellSlots3Avail > 0 ||
        numSpellSlots4Avail > 0 ||
        numSpellSlots5Avail > 0 ||
        numSpellSlots6Avail > 0 ||
        numSpellSlots7Avail > 0 ||
        numSpellSlots8Avail > 0 ||
        numSpellSlots9Avail > 0;

      //  Use a pact magic slot if we have any available and we're using pact magic, or if we don't have any spell slots available
      if (
        hasPactAvailable &&
        (record?.data?.usePactMagic || !hasSpellSlotsAvailable)
      ) {
        const availablePactSlots = [
          numPactMagicAvail1,
          numPactMagicAvail2,
          numPactMagicAvail3,
          numPactMagicAvail4,
          numPactMagicAvail5,
          numPactMagicAvail6,
          numPactMagicAvail7,
          numPactMagicAvail8,
          numPactMagicAvail9,
        ];

        const lowestPactMagicIndex = availablePactSlots.findIndex(
          (pactMagic) => pactMagic > 0
        );
        const lowestPactMagic = lowestPactMagicIndex + 1;

        if (lowestPactMagic > 0) {
          // Ensure that there is at least one available slot
          if (actualSpellLevel <= lowestPactMagic) {
            // For pact magic, we always upcast to the lowest available slot
            // (Generally never above level 5 but we allow it just in case)
            spellSlot = lowestPactMagic;
            fieldToUse = `pactMagic${lowestPactMagic}`;
            maxField = `numPactMagic${lowestPactMagic}`;
          }
        }
      } else {
        // Otherwise we use the spell slot for the level being cast at
        fieldToUse = `spellSlots${spellSlot}`;
        maxField = `numSpellSlots${spellSlot}`;
      }

      spellLevel = spellSlot;

      let numSpellSlots = parseInt(
        api.getValue(`data.${fieldToUse}`) || "0",
        10
      );
      let numMaxSpellSlots = parseInt(
        api.getValue(`data.${maxField}`) || "0",
        10
      );

      if (numSpellSlots < numMaxSpellSlots) {
        api.setValue(`data.${fieldToUse}`, numSpellSlots + 1);
      }
    } else if (spell?.data?.prepared === "daily") {
      let dailyUses = parseInt(spell?.data?.dailyUses, 10) || 0;
      let maxDailyUses = parseInt(spell?.data?.maxDailyUses, 10) || 1;
      if (dailyUses < maxDailyUses) {
        const dataPathToDaily = dataPath.replace(
          ".data.castBtn",
          ".data.dailyUses"
        );
        api.setValue(dataPathToDaily, dailyUses + 1);
      }
    }

    if (spell?.data?.level === "Cantrip") {
      // Cantrip handling
      // Get the character's level
      const characterLevel = parseInt(api.getValue("data.level") || "1", 10);
      if (characterLevel >= 5) {
        spellDamage = spell?.data?.damageCharacterLevel5 || spell?.data?.damage;
      }
      if (characterLevel >= 11) {
        spellDamage =
          spell?.data?.damageCharacterLevel11 || spell?.data?.damage;
      }
      if (characterLevel >= 17) {
        spellDamage =
          spell?.data?.damageCharacterLevel17 || spell?.data?.damage;
      }
    } else {
      // Spell handling
      // Check if we're upcasting
      if (spellLevel === 0) {
        spellLevel =
          parseInt(spell?.data?.upcastLevel || spell?.data?.level, 10) || 0;
      }
      // Check if damage is defined at that level
      if (spellLevel >= 2) {
        spellDamage =
          spell?.data?.[`damageLevel${spellLevel}`] || spell?.data?.damage;
        spellHealing =
          spell?.data?.[`healingLevel${spellLevel}`] || spell?.data?.healing;
      }
    }

    // Now that we know the spell level, go through all string modifiers and
    // replaced "Spell Level" with the actual spell level
    let levelToReplace = spellLevel;
    if (spell?.data?.level?.toLowerCase() === "cantrip") {
      levelToReplace = 0;
    }
    damageModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
      if (modifier?.valueType?.toLowerCase() === "string") {
        modifier.value = modifier.value.replace(
          /[Ss]pell [Ll]evel/g,
          levelToReplace
        );
      }
    });
    healingModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
      if (modifier?.valueType?.toLowerCase() === "string") {
        modifier.value = modifier.value.replace(
          /[Ss]pell [Ll]evel/g,
          levelToReplace
        );
      }
    });
    attackModifiers.forEach((modifier) => {
      if (modifier?.valueType?.toLowerCase() === "string") {
        modifier.value = modifier.value.replace(
          /[Ss]pell [Ll]evel/g,
          levelToReplace
        );
      }
    });

    // Spell range if set
    const spellRange = parseInt(spell?.data?.range || "0", 10);
    const rangedSpell = spellRange > 0;

    // Get save info, if Save
    const savingThrow = spell?.data?.savingThrow || "dexterity"; // Default to dexterity if not set
    // Spell Save DC is 8 + Spellcasting Ability Modifier + Proficiency Bonus (We assume they are proficient)
    const spellcastingAbility = spell?.data?.ability || "intelligence";
    const spellcastingAbilityMod =
      api.getValue(`data.${spellcastingAbility}Mod`) || 0;
    const proficiencyBonus =
      api.getValue("data.proficiencyBonus") !== undefined
        ? api.getValue("data.proficiencyBonus")
        : 2;
    let saveDc =
      8 +
      parseInt(spellcastingAbilityMod, 10) +
      parseInt(proficiencyBonus, 10) +
      spellDCBonus;
    // Get spell dc modifiers
    const spellDcModifiers = getEffectsAndModifiers(["spellDCBonus"]);
    saveDc += spellDcModifiers.reduce(
      (acc, mod) => acc + parseInt(mod?.value || "0", 10),
      0
    );

    // Damage Button if this is a Saving Throw Spell (Attacks have it on Attack Output)
    const saveDamageMetadata = spell?.data?.isSave
      ? {
          save: savingThrow,
          saveDc: saveDc,
          isSpell: true,
          damageIgnoresResistances,
          damageIgnoresImmunities,
        }
      : {};
    const damageButton =
      spell?.data?.damage && spell?.data?.isAttack !== true
        ? `\`\`\`Roll_Damage
api.promptRoll('${spellName} Damage', '${spellDamage}', ${JSON.stringify(
            damageModifiers
          )}, ${JSON.stringify(saveDamageMetadata)}, 'damage')
\`\`\``
        : "";

    const healingButton = spell?.data?.healing
      ? `\`\`\`Roll_Healing
api.promptRoll('${spellName} Healing', '${spellHealing}', ${JSON.stringify(
          healingModifiers
        )}, {}, 'healing')
\`\`\``
      : "";

    // Roll Attack Button, if Spell is an Attack, in the handler we get the targets and
    // roll for each target - DC for Attacks is the enemy's AC
    const rollAttackButton = spell?.data?.isAttack
      ? `\`\`\`Roll_Attack
const targets = api.getTargets();
const ourToken = api.getToken();
let disDueToProximity = false;
if (${rangedSpell} && ourToken) {
  api.getOtherTokens().forEach(token => {
    if (disDueToProximity) {
      // Short circuit if we already have disadvantage due to proximity
      return;
    }
    if (token?.faction !== 'neutral' && token?.faction !== ourToken?.faction) {
      // Check if they have incapacitated condition
      const hasIncapacitated = (token?.effects || []).some(eff => eff.name === 'Incapacitated');
      if (!hasIncapacitated) {
        // Check distance
        const distance = api.getDistance(ourToken, token);
        if (distance !== undefined && distance !== null && distance <= 5) {
          disDueToProximity = true;
        }
      }
    }
  });
}

let attackModifiers = ${JSON.stringify(attackModifiers)};

const autoCritical = attackModifiers.some(m => m.value === 'critical');
// Check for crit on 19 or some other number
const critOnMatch = /critical(\d+)/;
const critOnMods = attackModifiers
  .map(m => {
    const match = m.value.toString().match(critOnMatch);
    return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;
  })
  .filter(value => value !== null);

let critOn = null;
if (critOnMods.length) {
  critOn = Math.min(...critOnMods);
}

// Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
attackModifiers = attackModifiers.filter(m => !m.value.toString().startsWith('critical'));

const minRoll = getMinRollModifier(attackModifiers);
// Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
attackModifiers = attackModifiers.filter(
  (m) => !m.value.toString().startsWith("minroll")
);

targets.forEach(target => {
  // Get calculated AC from modifiers - use if any
  const targetAc = getArmorClassForToken(target?.token);
  const targetName = target?.token?.identified === false ? target?.token?.record?.unidentifiedName : target?.token?.record?.name;
  const targetDistance = api.getDistance(ourToken, target?.token);
  const diceRoll = '1d20';

  // If this is a ranged spell, and there are enemies within 5 feet, apply disadvantage
  if (disDueToProximity) {
    attackModifiers.push({
      name: 'Enemy is Within 5 Feet',
      value: 'disadvantage',
      active: true
    });
  }

  // Get effects and modifiers for the target
  const targetEffects = getAttackModifiersForTarget(target?.token, targetDistance);
  targetEffects.forEach(r => {
    attackModifiers.push(r);
  });

  const metadata = {  
    "rollName": 'Attack',
    "attack": '${spellName}',
    "icon": "IconWand",
    "targetName": targetName,
    "tooltip": 'Attack Roll for ${spellName}',
    "dc": targetAc,
    "damage": "${spellDamage}",
    "damageModifiers": ${JSON.stringify(damageModifiers)},
    "damageIgnoresResistances": '${damageIgnoresResistances}',
    "damageIgnoresImmunities": '${damageIgnoresImmunities}',
    "autoCritical": autoCritical,
    "critOn": critOn,
    "minRoll": minRoll,
    "isSpell": true
  }
  api.promptRoll('${spellName}', \`\$\{diceRoll\}\`, attackModifiers, metadata, 'attack');
});
if (!targets.length) {
  const diceRoll = '1d20';
  const metadata = {
    "rollName": 'Attack',
    "attack": '${spellName}',
    "icon": "IconWand",
    "tooltip": 'Attack Roll for ${spellName}',
    "dc": 0,
    "damage": "${spellDamage}",
    "critOn": critOn,
    "minRoll": minRoll,
    "damageModifiers": ${JSON.stringify(damageModifiers)},
    "damageIgnoresResistances": '${damageIgnoresResistances}',
    "damageIgnoresImmunities": '${damageIgnoresImmunities}',
    "isSpell": true
  }

  // If this is a ranged spell, and there are enemies within 5 feet, apply disadvantage
  if (disDueToProximity) {
    attackModifiers.push({
      name: 'Enemy is Within 5 Feet',
      value: 'disadvantage',
      active: true
    });
  }

  api.promptRoll('${spellName}', \`\$\{diceRoll\}\`, attackModifiers, metadata, 'attack');
}
\`\`\``
      : "";

    // Save Button for GM only - look up saves of selected tokens and prompt roll for each
    const rollSaveButton = spell?.data?.isSave
      ? `\`\`\`Roll_Save
const selectedTokens = api.getSelectedOrDroppedToken();
selectedTokens.forEach(token => {
  let saveModifiers = [];
  const modifier = token?.data?.['${savingThrow}Save'] || 0;
  saveModifiers.push({
    name: '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Save',
    value: modifier,
    active: true,
  });

  const saveMods = getEffectsAndModifiersForToken(token, ['saveBonus', 'savePenalty'], '${savingThrow}');
  // Also get modifiers specific to spells
  const spellSaveMods = getEffectsAndModifiersForToken(token, ['saveBonus', 'savePenalty'], 'spell');
  
  // Filter out duplicates based on name, value, type, and active status
  const allMods = [...saveMods, ...spellSaveMods].filter((mod, index, array) => {
    return index === array.findIndex(m => 
      m.name === mod.name && 
      m.value === mod.value && 
      m.modifierType === mod.modifierType && 
      m.active === mod.active
    );
  });
  
  allMods.forEach(mod => {
    saveModifiers.push(mod);
  });

  const minRoll = getMinRollModifier(saveModifiers);
  // Filter these out of the modifiers array, we don't need them to be toggleable
  saveModifiers = saveModifiers.filter(m => !m.value.toString().startsWith('minroll'));

  const metadata = {
    "rollName": '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Save',
    "tooltip": '${capitalize(savingThrow)} Saving Throw',
    "dc": ${saveDc},
    "minRoll": minRoll
  }

  api.promptRollForToken(token, '${capitalize(
    savingThrow
  )} Save', '1d20', saveModifiers, metadata, 'save');
});
\`\`\``
      : "";

    // Create macros for all effects that this spell can apply
    let effectButtons = "";
    const effects = spell?.data?.effects || [];
    effects.forEach((effectJson) => {
      const effect = JSON.parse(effectJson);
      const effectName = effect?.name || "";
      const effectID = effect?._id || "";
      const effectTitle = `Apply_${effectName.replace(/ /g, "_")}`;
      if (effectButtons !== "") {
        effectButtons += "\n";
      }
      effectButtons += `\`\`\`${effectTitle}
let targets = api.getSelectedOrDroppedToken();
targets.forEach(target => {
  api.addEffectById('${effectID}', target);
});
\`\`\``;
    });

    const message = `
#### ${spellIcon}${spellName}

---
 

${spellDescription}

---
 

${rollAttackButton}
${rollSaveButton}
${damageButton}
${healingButton}
${effectButtons}
`;

    const castingTime = spell?.data?.castingTime;
    const range = spell?.data?.range;
    let duration = spell?.data?.duration || "";
    // If there is a higher level duration, use that instead
    if (spellLevel >= 2) {
      duration = spell?.data?.[`durationLevel${spellLevel}`] || duration;
    }
    const hasConcentration = duration
      ?.toLowerCase()
      .startsWith("concentration");
    const durationTag = duration.replace("Concentration, ", "").trim();

    let components = spell?.data?.components;
    if (components) {
      // First clean up any extra spaces around commas
      components = components.trim().replace(/\s*,\s*/g, ",");
      // Split on V, S, M, or F, ignoring case
      components = components.split(/,(?=[VSMF])/i);
      components = components.map((component) => {
        const trimmedComponent = component.trim().toLowerCase(); // Trim and convert to lower case
        if (trimmedComponent === "v") {
          return "Verbal";
        } else if (trimmedComponent === "s") {
          return "Somatic";
        } else if (trimmedComponent === "m") {
          return "Material";
        } else if (trimmedComponent === "f") {
          return "Focus";
        } else if (trimmedComponent.match(/^m\s*\(/i)) {
          // Check if material component has a cost
          return trimmedComponent.toLowerCase().includes("worth")
            ? "Material $"
            : "Material";
        }
        return component.trim(); // Return the trimmed component if no match
      });
    }

    const tags = [
      {
        tooltip: "Cast a Spell",
        name: "Spell",
      },
    ];

    if (castingTime) {
      tags.push({
        tooltip: "Casting Time",
        name: castingTime.includes(",")
          ? castingTime.split(",")[0]
          : castingTime,
      });
    }

    if (range) {
      tags.push({
        tooltip: "Range",
        name: range,
      });
    }

    if (hasConcentration) {
      tags.push({
        tooltip: "This Spell Requires Concentration",
        name: "Concentration",
      });
    }

    if (durationTag) {
      tags.push({
        tooltip: "Duration",
        name: durationTag,
      });
    }

    if (components && Array.isArray(components) && components.length > 0) {
      components.forEach((component) => {
        tags.push({
          tooltip: component.includes("$")
            ? "Spell Components (with Cost Requirement)"
            : "Spell Components",
          name: component,
        });
      });
    }

    let lostConcentrationOn = "";
    if (hasConcentration) {
      // Check for existing Concentration effect
      const tokenForRecord = api.getToken();
      const effects = tokenForRecord?.effects || [];
      const hasEffect = effects.find(
        (effect) => effect?.name?.toLowerCase() === "concentration"
      );
      if (tokenForRecord) {
        const effectValue = spellName;
        // Old spell name
        let oldSpellName = "";
        const oldValues = tokenForRecord?.effectValues || {};
        if (oldValues[hasEffect?._id]) {
          oldSpellName = oldValues[hasEffect?._id];
        }
        lostConcentrationOn = oldSpellName;
        // Add concentration effect, which will replace any existing concentration effect
        const durationSeconds = getDurationInSeconds(duration);
        api.addEffect(
          "Concentration",
          tokenForRecord,
          durationSeconds,
          effectValue
        );
      }
    }

    api.sendMessage(message, undefined, [], tags);

    if (lostConcentrationOn) {
      api.sendMessage(
        `Lost concentration on ${lostConcentrationOn}.`,
        undefined,
        [],
        []
      );
    }
  }

  // Returns the options for upcasting a spell
  function getLevelOptions() {
    const iconButtonOptions = [
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber1", label: "Level 1", value: 1 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber2", label: "Level 2", value: 2 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber3", label: "Level 3", value: 3 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber4", label: "Level 4", value: 4 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber5", label: "Level 5", value: 5 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber6", label: "Level 6", value: 6 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber7", label: "Level 7", value: 7 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber8", label: "Level 8", value: 8 },
      { icon: "IconCircleNumber9", label: "Level 9", value: 9 },
    ];

    const spellLevel = parseInt(value?.data?.level, 10) || 0; // Default to 0 if no level is set
    return iconButtonOptions.filter((option) => option.value >= spellLevel);
  }

  function toggleDaily() {
    const prepared = value;
    // We're in a list, so we need to use the data path to the fields metadata
    const dataPathToHideDaily = dataPath.replace(
      ".data.prepared",
      ".fields.maxDailyUses.hidden"
    );
    const dataPathToHideCounter = dataPath.replace(
      ".data.prepared",
      ".fields.dailyUses.hidden"
    );
    const dataPathToHideRestore = dataPath.replace(
      ".data.prepared",
      ".fields.restoreOnRest.hidden"
    );
    const valuesToSet = {};
    if (prepared === "daily") {
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideDaily] = false;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideCounter] = false;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideRestore] = false;
    } else {
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideDaily] = true;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideCounter] = true;
      valuesToSet[dataPathToHideRestore] = true;
    }
    api.setValues(valuesToSet);
  }
</script>
